claim: For a 16777216-element skewed 256-bin uint32 histogram on AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201, block-private shared-memory bins measured 11.081940x faster than direct global atomics using HIP-event timing only.
expected_profiler_signals: higher effective input throughput under skewed distribution
curation_note: timing-only skewed-histogram record: HIP-event timings and exact CPU-reference correctness passed, but rocprofiler/rocprof counters were not collected. The optimized run includes one implausibly tiny min sample, so use median and p10/p90 rather than best-of timing.
